evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: ALL; min age 18 Years; healthy volunteers: f. CRITERIA: "Inclusion Criteria:~* Informed consent obtained~* Body Mass Index (BMI) of 30.0 kg/m^2 or above~* Body Mass Index (BMI) of 27 kg/m^2 or above in the presence of co-morbidities of treated or untreated dyslipidemia and/or hypertension~* Stable body weight~* Preceding failed dietary effort~Exclusion Criteria:~* Known type 1 or type 2 diabetes~* Glycosylated haemoglobin (HbA1c) of 6.5 % or above (Screening visit 1) or FPG of 126 mg/dL (7 mmol/L) or above (Screening visit 2) or 2 hour post-challen...

NMA_CONFIG.outcome_label: HbA1c change from baseline at primary timepoint (26–40 weeks) — mean difference (MD, %)
NMA_CONFIG.note: Rich network: Tirz–Sema direct (SURPASS-2); Sema–Dula direct (SUSTAIN-7); Dula–Lira direct (AWARD-6); Lira–Exe direct (LEAD-6); Sema–Exe direct (SUSTAIN-3). One closed 4-node loop (Sema–Dula–Lira–Exe–Sema) enables consistency testing. Tirz/Sema anchored to Placebo via SURPASS-1 and SUSTAIN-1. Exenatide is a composite node (ER in SUSTAIN-3, BID in LEAD-6) — declared in transitivity.

title: RapidMeta Endocrine | Obesity Pharmacotherapy NMA (GLP-1, GIP/GLP-1, Amylin) v1.0
